data.content: Plan review requested revisions. The proposed plan correctly identifies the likely model-identity gap behind the repeated OpenRouter failure loop, but it is not complete against the acceptance criteria as written. It does not explicitly remove the current basic-mode stop condition for error retries in src/lib/terminal-manager-take-agent.ts, so acceptance criterion 4 is not yet covered. It also does not explicitly describe the required behavior change in src/lib/agent-pool.ts so exclusion requests never silently fall back to the excluded agent, leaving acceptance criterion 5 underspecified. Revised plan should name those code paths directly, define the exclusion identity strategy clearly, and include regression tests for basic-mode retry rotation and no-silent-fallback selection.
